title: You can now set permissions on the files/docs column!
excerpt:

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are excited to announce a release that has been long awaited… finally, users can apply column permissions on the file/docs column in their board

These permissions allow for the ability to restrict column edit or view so that confidential documentation remains safe, secure, and accessible only to those who are authorised. Any restrictions set for that column will apply across the entire system, including areas such as the files gallery and via the search everything tool.

336364216_937152884395979_922209139371682167_n1182×862 55.3 KB

This feature is being released to all plan types: Basic, Standard, Pro, and Enterprise

We hope you’re as excited as we are about this update!

posts.author: eClaireS (Claire Sowden)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great! Our HR person is going to love this. Thank you
